title: SNDL Inc (SNDL) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Profitability and Strategic Growth
text: SNDL Inc achieved a historic milestone by reporting positive operating income and net earnings for the first time in company history. The cannabis division expanded at nearly three times the rate of Canada's recreational market, significantly outpacing direct competitors. The liquor retail operations showed renewed momentum, with Wine and Beyond experiencing 7.2% growth in revenue. The company simultaneously trimmed overhead costs, reducing annual expenses by $5 million year-over-year despite inflationary headwinds. Financial strength improved substantially, with the company maintaining zero debt and over $200 million in available cash reserves. However, CEO Zach George acknowledged headwinds, including negative free cash flow of $7.9 million during the quarter due to working capital investments and seasonal cash outflows. The company holds approximately 2% market share in Canada and emphasized pursuing profitable growth rather than pure market share expansion. Management expressed confidence in international expansion opportunities, particularly in European markets, while navigating ongoing U.S. asset consolidation challenges.
